_source: GET https://cdn.syndication.twimg.com/tweet-result?id=<id>&token=<t>&lang=en (public syndication endpoint). Real STRUCTURE mirroring the captured tweet-result envelope, trimmed to a LIVE/broadcast tweet whose `video_info.variants` carry only an `application/x-mpegURL` (HLS) master and no progressive `video/mp4` — so the resolver must take the HLS fallback. The companion tweet-result-video.json covers the mp4 path; this covers the HLS-master path. The signed playlist token is a placeholder (the resolver host-pins to twimg.com and returns the URL verbatim).
